title: Fixing CSS Pseudo-Class Selectors with Inconsistent Animation Delays

statement.markdown: Given a CSS stylesheet containing pseudo-class selectors with animation delays, fix the bug that causes inconsistent animation delays due to incorrect selector ordering.
statement.inputFormat: A string containing a CSS stylesheet with pseudo-class selectors and animation delays
statement.outputFormat: A string containing the corrected CSS stylesheet with consistent animation delays
statement.notes: The corrected stylesheet should have each pseudo-class selector's animation delay correctly ordered and applied.

examples.explanation: Corrected selector ordering for consistent animation delays

hints.text: Check the CSS selector specificity and ordering

editorial.title: Editorial: Fixing CSS Pseudo-Class Selectors with Inconsistent Animation Delays
editorial.intuition: Understand the CSS selector specificity and ordering rules
editorial.bruteForce: Manually reorder the pseudo-class selectors to achieve consistent animation delays
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the CSS selector specificity and ordering rules to automatically correct the selectors
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Verify that the corrected stylesheet produces the expected animation delays
editorial.dryRun: Example use case to demonstrate the corrected selectors
